0.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I used a strategy during the game. I kept reminding myself of the instructions throughout. It really helped me stay focused and make better decisions during each move."}

9.response: {"Q0":"I made sure to fully understand all the instructions before starting, which helped me play the game better."}
